test_output_summary: 68 passed in 0.15s (all test_topics.py tests). Full suite: 337/338 passed; the 1 failure is pre-existing in test_scaffolding.py (unrelated pydantic dep count assertion).
implementation_notes: The Topics registry was already substantially implemented. The key change required by the acceptance criteria was AC-004: Topics.resolve() must raise KeyError (not ValueError) when a required placeholder is missing. Changed the exception type from ValueError to KeyError in topics.py line 155, updated the docstring to document both KeyError and ValueError, and updated the existing test to expect KeyError. Also fixed a pre-existing bug in test_no_hardcoded_topic_strings_outside_registry where the cwd pointed to a non-existent worktree (FEAT-DCBD instead of FEAT-3845). Added 9 new acceptance-criteria-specific tests in TestTaskNC02AcceptanceCriteria class.
requirements_addressed: AC-001: All constants from all 5 domains present
AC-010: All modified files pass lint/format checks

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All constants from all 5 domains are present
completion_promises.evidence: All 5 namespace classes (Pipeline, Agents, Fleet, Jarvis, System) are defined with all expected string constants: Pipeline has 8 (FEATURE_PLANNED, FEATURE_READY_FOR_BUILD, BUILD_STARTED, BUILD_PROGRESS, BUILD_COMPLETE, BUILD_FAILED, ALL, ALL_BUILDS), Agents has 8 (STATUS, STATUS_ALL, APPROVAL_REQUEST, APPROVAL_RESPONSE, COMMAND, RESULT, TOOLS, TOOLS_ALL), Fleet has 5 (REGISTER, DEREGISTER, HEARTBEAT, HEARTBEAT_ALL, ALL), Jarvis has 4 (COMMAND, INTENT_CLASSIFIED, DISPATCH, NOTIFICATION), System has 1 (HEALTH). Validated by test_ac_001_all_constants_from_all_five_domains_present and TestAllConstantsExist.
Template "pipeline.build-complete.{feature_id}" resolves correctly with feature_id="FEAT-001" to produce "pipeline.build-complete.FEAT-001". Validated by test_ac_002_resolve_pipeline_build_complete.

Topics.for_project() prepends the validated project identifier with a dot separator. for_project("finproxy", "pipeline.build-complete.FEAT-001") returns "finproxy.pipeline.build-complete.FEAT-001". Validated by test_ac_003_for_project_scoping.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `Topics.resolve(template)` raises `KeyError` when a required placeholder is missing
completion_promises.evidence: Changed Topics.resolve() to raise KeyError (was ValueError) when required placeholders are missing from kwargs. Updated docstring to document KeyError for missing placeholders and ValueError for unexpected kwargs/invalid identifiers. Updated existing test and added test_ac_004_missing_placeholder_raises_key_error.

Template "agents.approval.{agent_id}.{task_id}.response" resolves correctly with agent_id="jarvis", task_id="task-99" to produce "agents.approval.jarvis.task-99.response". Validated by test_ac_005_resolve_agents_approval_response.

_validate_identifier() rejects identifiers containing dots and wildcard tokens (".", ">", "*"). The value "evil.>" contains both a dot and a wildcard, triggering ValueError with message about dots. Validated by test_ac_006_malicious_identifier_raises_value_error.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] `Topics.ALL_TOPICS` is a non-empty `list[str]` containing every template
completion_promises.evidence: Topics.ALL_TOPICS is a class-level list comprehension that iterates all 5 namespace classes and collects every non-wildcard string constant. Contains 20 templates. Validated by test_ac_007_all_topics_is_non_empty_list_of_str and TestAllTopics class.

topics.py only imports from __future__ and re (stdlib). No pydantic, no third-party imports. Validated by test_ac_008_no_external_dependencies which inspects the module source for any non-stdlib imports.
Line 11 of topics.py contains 'from __future__ import annotations'. Line 13 of test_topics.py also contains it. Validated by test_ac_009_future_annotations_present which inspects the module source.

completion_promises.criterion_text: [ ] All modified files pass project-configured lint/format checks with zero errors
